title: NOVA
description: NOVA is a future project by FabiYT_. Download it NOW to get your own impression.
body:
# 🌌 **NOVA – The Official Modpack for the Series** 🌌

In NOVA, it’s about more than just survival – it’s the story of a mission with no return. A man sends a group of brave pioneers into space to explore the unknown. But everyone knows: there will be no way back.

![The logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4087520517197a6146e1dcc3a1a40c53eadc508.jpeg)

This **official** modpack, used to create the NOVA series, offers a diverse mix of mods:

✨ **Building & Decoration Mods** – Create futuristic bases and detailed worlds.\
🎬 **Filmmaking Mods** – Perfect for cinematic shots and roleplay elements.\
🔧 **Tools** – Useful utilities, technology, and much more.\
🌍 **A bit of everything** – Not only sci-fi, but a versatile pack for every playstyle.\

> _The series is currently in production and will be released online in the future – but with this modpack, you can already dive into the universe of NOVA._

**Welcome to NOVA. 🚀**
